description_long: This is a decorative vase with a predominantly pink exterior, featuring intricate gold floral motifs and a textured surface. The body of the vase is bulbous, tapering at the neck and base, with a wide, flat rim and foot. The upper section displays a white oval medallion bordered with gold, containing a mottled brown and gold pattern. The surface finish is glossy, enhancing the vibrancy of the pink and gold colors. The interior appears to be hollow and is also colored pink, with some visible wear or residue. The vase exudes an ornate, antique aesthetic, suitable for display in elegant or historical urban settings.
description: A pink, gold-embellished vase with a bulbous body, ornate patterns, and a glossy finish. Features a white medallion and intricate floral motifs.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, flat rim with pink and gold floral patterns and a glimpse of the medallion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bulbous body, gold floral motifs, and the white medallion with brown pattern.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view revealing the hollow pink interior and the flat base of the vase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous gold floral motifs and the vase's overall shape.
